title: Blackspur BB-HM151 Stubby Claw Hammer
features: Ideal for use in compact spaces
Double injected cushion grip handle for comfortable use
Magnetic head holds nails in place
description: Product Description Blackspur 10oz stubby claw drop forged, heat treated hammer comes with a magnetic head for helping to hold nails in place. Double injected cushion grip handle provides extra comfort. It is ideal for use in compact spaces. Supplied in 1/2 double blister. Supplying quality products. One of the most comprehensive ranges of hand tools and DIY associated products in the UK. Box Contains 1x Hammer
